body: added adr-0009 implementing cross-scope relationships via LightRAG and deterministic source-ID traversal. rejected LLM synthesis as a “confabulation engine”. now to see if relationship density hits the 15% threshold in handoff.md before S0 exit.

added ADRs for per-scope summaries and content-derived `graph_commit` to dodge LLM non-determinism. updated `KnowledgeStore.upsert` signature and fixed a stale line in `CONTEXT.md`. spent an hour arguing with the docs.

added a Projects v2 pipeline via github_projects.py that pushes items to siteData.js. uses LLM commentary cached against (id, updatedAt) in roadmap_sync.py to avoid burning tokens on unchanged tasks. GraphQL is a nightmare — next is cleaning up the frontend display.

added `scripts/autorun.sh` and `scripts/register-task.ps1` to trigger daily runs at 9am. logs are dumped into `logs/autorun.YYYY-MM.log`. it crashes with “connection refused” if lm studio isn't already open—fragile, but functional.

added bot autorun to sequence sync, introduce, and log drafting—auto-accepting drafts that meet basic length requirements. stripped the “judge:” prefix from notes to stop leaking internal jargon. hope it doesn't hallucinate a whole new website.

added 8 detectors, posd-lint.toml config, and a /posd-review skill for Claude Code. implemented SCC-based effect propagation to hit full coverage of all 18 "red flags" — detector count is now at 24. wrote 39 new tests; next is figuring out why the findings baseline jumped from 96 to 136.

tied accepted logs to now.text candidates in review.py, superseding old drafts. updated now_updater.py to prioritize log.json over raw commit activity. a bit of a mess in the state logic — need to prune the draft queue next.

removed `evergreenlabs-bot` from skip lists in introduce.py, log_drafter.py, and others. the bot is now a first-class project rather than “invisible” infrastructure. next to see if it can actually introduce itself without breaking things.

init local automation to pull github activity and draft entries via a local llm. canonical data lives in `data/site/*.json` before regenerating `siteData.js`. spent way too long on the prompt—now for the first real run.
Spent a Saturday on a sentiment analyzer for my git commit messages. Works, kind of. Not sure I want to know.
